{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech armor
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aethertech armor]] is used to support users in mundane battlefields.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c14">''The Engineer'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aethertech armor]] can release a pulse that acts as a scan.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
